candidates.key: Symptoms include mucous discharge, weight loss, reduced appetite and abdominal bloating for 4 weeks. Additional symptoms include back pain.
candidates.evidence:
Symptoms include mucous discharge, weight loss, reduced appetite and abdominal bloating for 4 weeks. Additional symptoms include back pain.

Imaging:
Flexi sig 20/10/2024: rectal cancer, 2.5cm across, fixed, abnormal PIT pattern, unsuitable for local excision 
MR rectum on 03/11/2024: semiannular mass in low rectum, infiltrates ISP, T3c, N1, EMVI- PSW-
CT TAP: no mets, incidental adrenal lesion
